dialogue:
[A] Who is the leading actor of the movie Left Right Love Destiny?
[B] It's Cecilia Cheung
[A] You even know that. Excellent!
[B] Thank you for your praise. She's a Chinese idol. Of course I know her.
[A] Yes my idol is quite unusual.
[B] She is also an Asian Outstanding Artist in New York Chinese Film Festival. Excellent.
[A] Yes. People like her will shine wherever they go.
[B] Then don't miss her movie Failan. It shows a love tragedy in which the two people are secluded in different time spaces. However, the movie doesn't just tell a sad but beautiful love story. Through the story, the audiences can see the director's profound thinking and understanding of life and human nature.
[A] Although I really like her, I prefer to see Nicholas Tse's movies.
[B] Then you can watch Nicholas Tse's movie The Stool Pigeon. His acting is good.
[A] What kind of movie is it?
[B] It's an action drama, with a little bit of thriller.
[A] Woah, sounds interesting.
[B] I'm sure you'll like it.
[A] Then I'm leaving too see the movie.
[B] Okay, see you next time.

[A] Baby, can you tell me the weather today?
[B] OK, today in Hengshui it is sunny, with southwest winds. The high will be 4 ℃ and low - 7 ℃. Be sure to keep warm.
[A] Wow, you're great. You know everything. Great!
[B] There's nothing I don't know. I also know that today's weather is suitable to eat Marinated Fish.
[A] Okay, I like it.
[B] I know a restaurant where the Marinated Fish is made of grouper.
[A] Woah, there's grouper! I really like it! It's a tonic! I really want to have it!
[B] If you like it so much, I know a restaurant which cooks groupers very well. Mr.Fish Roasted. The Marinated Fish here is very authentic!
[A] Then tell me about the average meal cost per person, the address and the ratings.
[B] It costs 0 yuan per person. The address is the intersection of Liushi Road, Huzhuang commercial and residential building, Yingbin North Street, Jizhou District, Jizhou. 5 points, very high.
[A] Okay. I'll be there tomorrow noon with my partner, taking her to have a taste. Hehe!
[B] Okay, I'll make a reservation for you. I'll say bon appetite in advance!
[A] Thanks. Then I'm going to bed first. See you tomorrow. Bye.
[B] All right. Bye~

[A] Let's listen to Hand in Hand.
[B] It's playing for you. Please enjoy it!
[A] The songs of Leehom Wang are still so good.
[B] Then I recommend that you listen to Change Me, which is also sung by Leehom Wang. It's a song with a rock&roll style. Unlike Leehom Wang's previous works which are exciting and passionate, it starts from the bottom of the heart and finds the emotion in the ordinary with a calm heart.
[A] I‘ve heard it, and I'm not interested in this song.
[B] Then you can listen to his All the Things You Never Knew, which is very catchy. Both the melody and the lyrics along the movie are very impressive.
[A] I haven't listened to it before. How is it?
[B] It's catchy. You can't miss it.
[A] Sounds good! I wanna listen to it.
[B] May I play this song for you?
[A] Sure.
[B] It's playing for you. Please enjoy it!
[A] It's a good song. Okay, I need to go now. See you next time.
[B] All right. Bye!

[A] Good afternoon. What's the weather like today?
[B] Today in Xining it is sunny, with northwest winds. The high will be 6 ℃ and low - 12 ℃. The temperature is low. Keep warm.
[A] Okay, I'll be careful. Thank you.
[B] Hehe. This weather is suitable to eat Sautéed Spicy Pork.
[A] I was thinking about what to eat and then you recommend. You can read my mind.
[B] Haha. Then don't miss Sautéed Spicy Pork.
[A] I'll have it for lunch.
[B] I know a place which cooks Sautéed Spicy Pork very well, and that is Laoqi Sichuan Restaurant.
[A] How much does this restaurant cost per person?
[B] 32 yuan.
[A] It's affordable. What's the address?
[B] Next to Yinhe Fish, Golden Home, No.914 Qilian Road, Chengbei District. It's easy to find it.
[A] Okay. I've checked it and it's not very far. What about the ratings?
[B] 4.7 points, very high.
[A] The score is high. Okay, I'll choose this one. Three of us, at around 1 pm. Would you please make a reservation?
[B] Okay, I'll do it right now.
[A] Thank you. I'll go first, bye.
[B] Okay. Goodbye.

[B] Good evening. What are you doing?
[A] Hello! I'm watching anime.
[B] How are you doing lately?
[A] I've stepped backwards in my schoolwork and I've been criticized by my parents today. I'm not happy.
[B] Then let me talk to you to make you relaxed. What's your name?
[A] My name is Xinqian Zhang.
[B] Nice name. Are you a boy or a girl?
[A] Of course a girl since my name is catchy!
[B] How old are you this year?
[A] I'm eight years old.
[B] What do you like to do?
[A] Yes, I like small animals, watching animations and listening to children's songs.
[B] Well your life is colorful.
[A] I should go to bed early. So bye.
[B] Okay, see you next time. Bye.
[A] Bye!
